user.title: XBloom Coffee Machine
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your XBloom device. Run `xbloom scan` from a terminal to discover it, or check the XBloom Studio app.

account.title: XBloom Cloud Account (optional)
account.description: Optional — enter your XBloom app email/password to enable cloud recipe sync (search, import, export). Leave both blank to skip; the integration works fully over Bluetooth without an account, and cloud-only features will report a clear error instead of running.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the XBloom device. Check the MAC address and ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
error.account_incomplete: Enter both email and password, or leave both blank to skip cloud setup.

abort.no_devices_found: No XBloom devices found nearby. Make sure the machine is powered on.

account.title: XBloom Cloud Account
account.description: Add, update, or remove the optional XBloom cloud account used for cloud recipe sync (search, import, export). Leave both fields blank to remove a saved account, or leave the email unchanged with the password blank to make no changes. Setting a new or different email requires a password.

add_recipe.title: Add a recipe
add_recipe.description: Paste the recipe in YAML format. See docs/en/brewing-notes.md and skills/xbloom-brew/references/yaml-schema.md for the field reference.

edit_recipe_yaml.title: Edit a recipe
edit_recipe_yaml.description: Edit the YAML below. Renaming the recipe (changing the `name:` field) is allowed.

error.invalid_recipe: Recipe does not match the schema — {error}
error.recipe_exists: A recipe named {error} already exists. Use 'Edit a recipe' instead or pick another name.
error.account_password_required: Enter the password to set or change the cloud account.
error.account_email_required: Enter the email to set the cloud account.

abort.no_recipes: No recipes available. Use 'Add a recipe' to create one.

execute_recipe.name: Execute recipe
execute_recipe.description: Run a saved XBloom recipe, optionally overriding any top-level recipe scalar (grind size, RPM, dose, ratio, cup type, bypass) for this brew only — the stored recipe is unchanged. Overriding dose/ratio rescales the pour volumes proportionally.

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which recipe to run — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name. Defaults to the currently selected recipe.

dose_g.name: Dose
dose_g.description: Override the coffee dose in grams for this brew only. Pour volumes are rescaled to keep total water = dose × ratio.

ratio.name: Water ratio
ratio.description: Override the water ratio (total water = dose × ratio) for this brew only. Pour volumes are rescaled to match.

cup_type.name: Cup type
cup_type.description: Override the cup/brewer type for this brew only.

grind_size.name: Grind size
grind_size.description: Override the grind size (0 = finest, 80 = coarsest) for this brew only.

rpm.name: Grinder RPM
rpm.description: Override the grinder RPM for this brew only.

bypass_volume.name: Bypass volume
bypass_volume.description: Bypass water volume in ml added after the pours (0 = bypass off). Can be added even if the recipe has no bypass. Coffee recipes only.

bypass_temperature.name: Bypass temperature
bypass_temperature.description: Bypass water temperature in °C (0 = bypass off). Pair with a non-zero bypass volume. Coffee recipes only.

execute_tea_recipe.name: Execute tea recipe
execute_tea_recipe.description: Run a saved XBloom tea recipe. Tea uses a different BLE sequence than coffee and takes no dose/ratio/grind/bypass overrides — use execute_recipe for coffee recipes instead.

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which tea recipe to run — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name. Defaults to the currently selected recipe.

write_recipe_to_easy_slot.name: Write recipe to Easy Mode slot
write_recipe_to_easy_slot.description: Store a recipe in one of the machine's three onboard Easy Mode slots (A/B/C) so it can be run from the machine's physical buttons. Does not brew; existing slot contents are overwritten.

slot.name: Slot
slot.description: Target Easy Mode slot (A, B, or C).

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which recipe to store — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name. Defaults to the currently selected recipe.

cloud_import_recipe.name: Import recipe from XBloom cloud
cloud_import_recipe.description: Fetch a recipe from an XBloom cloud share URL or id and save it as a local recipe. No XBloom account login is required.

share_url.name: Share URL
share_url.description: A share-h5.xbloom.com link (e.g. from the official app's Share button) or a collective.xbloom.com/recipe/{id} community-hub link. Provide this or recipe_id, not both.

recipe_id.name: Recipe ID
recipe_id.description: The bare share id (the base64 value after ?id= in a share URL). Provide this or share_url, not both.

cloud_export_recipe.name: Export recipe to XBloom cloud
cloud_export_recipe.description: Export a local recipe to the configured XBloom cloud account. With an account, the recipe is created (or updated in place if exported before) and the response includes its cloud id and share link; without one, only the recipe definition is returned.

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which recipe to export — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name.

list_recipes.name: List recipes
list_recipes.description: List every local recipe (the ones shown in the Recipe dropdown), optionally filtered by name. Results include each recipe's local uid and any cloud id / share URL.

query.name: Query
query.description: Filter results to recipes whose name contains this text (case-insensitive). Omit to list every recipe.

create_recipe.name: Create recipe
create_recipe.description: Create a new local recipe from an inline YAML definition. It appears in the Recipe dropdown immediately; use cloud_export_recipe to publish it to the XBloom cloud.

recipe_yaml.name: Recipe (YAML)
recipe_yaml.description: The recipe definition in the same YAML format as the "Add a recipe" options-flow step.

edit_recipe.name: Edit recipe
edit_recipe.description: Change one or more fields of a local recipe. Only the fields present in the YAML are changed. A share URL that isn't local yet is imported first (cloud recipes are never edited directly).

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which recipe to edit — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name.

changes.name: Fields to change (YAML)
changes.description: A YAML mapping of only the fields to change (e.g. just `name: New Name` to rename). Omitted fields are left unchanged.

delete_recipe.name: Delete recipe
delete_recipe.description: Delete a local recipe. It disappears from the Recipe dropdown immediately; a copy on the XBloom cloud account (if any) is not touched.

recipe.name: Recipe
recipe.description: Which recipe to delete — a local uid, a cloud table id, a share URL/id, or the exact recipe name.

cloud_search_collective_recipes.name: Search XBloom collective recipes
cloud_search_collective_recipes.description: Search XBloom's public community recipe hub (collective.xbloom.com) — recipes shared by xBloom and other users. No account required. Category filters are multi-select; besides the listed options you can type a raw code directly (covers categories added upstream later — please report new codes on GitHub).

machine.name: Machine model
machine.description: Machine model(s) to filter by (multi-select; a raw code or display name can also be typed).

sort.name: Sort by
sort.description: date, likes, or downloads. Defaults to likes.

sort_direction.name: Sort direction
sort_direction.description: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.
